case_title: RAHSAAN JOHNSON VS. CHARLES BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RAHSAAN AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, CHARLES SECURITY STORAGE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-04-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-06-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAMES M. ROGERS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-10-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-26-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-04-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2002, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
